$comment: Ratchet for TypeDoc conversion warnings (referenced-but-not-included types etc.). The build fails when the count EXCEEDS maxWarnings; when a change lowers the count, lower maxWarnings in the same PR so the improvement can never regress. Reached 0 on 2026-07-20 (115 cleared) - keep it there: every type referenced by a public API must be exported from a documented barrel.
